title: hieracium caesium subsp. similifolium
intro: Hieracium caesium subsp. similifolium is a subspecies of the Hawkweed plant, which is a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). It is traditionally used in folk medicine, valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to offer health benefits such as soothing digestive issues, reducing fever, and aiding in wound healing. In herbal preparations, Hieracium caesium subsp. similifolium is often used in the form of infusions, tinctures, and salves, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
